title: RHCSA 10 Lab 03: IPv6 Networking
description: Configure persistent IPv6 networking with NetworkManager

tasks: On client, configure the active lab connection with IPv6 address fd00:10::45/64.
On client, set IPv6 gateway fd00:10::1.
On client, ensure IPv6 method is manual and the profile autoconnects.
hints: Modify the connection profile rather than using ip addr add.
Use nmcli -g to verify persistent profile values.
checks: connection_name="System eth1"; nmcli -g NAME connection show "$connection_name" >/dev/null 2>&1 || connection_name="$(private_dev="$(ip -o -4 addr show | awk '$4 ~ /^192\.168\.122\./ {print $2; exit}')"; nmcli -t -f NAME,DEVICE connection show --active | awk -F: -v private_dev="$private_dev" '$2 == private_dev {print $1; exit}')"; test -n "$connection_name" && nmcli -g ipv6.addresses connection show "$connection_name" | sed 's/\\//g' | grep -qx 'fd00:10::45/64'

connection_name="System eth1"; nmcli -g NAME connection show "$connection_name" >/dev/null 2>&1 || connection_name="$(private_dev="$(ip -o -4 addr show | awk '$4 ~ /^192\.168\.122\./ {print $2; exit}')"; nmcli -t -f NAME,DEVICE connection show --active | awk -F: -v private_dev="$private_dev" '$2 == private_dev {print $1; exit}')"; test -n "$connection_name" && nmcli -g ipv6.gateway connection show "$connection_name" | sed 's/\\//g' | grep -qx 'fd00:10::1'

connection_name="System eth1"; nmcli -g NAME connection show "$connection_name" >/dev/null 2>&1 || connection_name="$(private_dev="$(ip -o -4 addr show | awk '$4 ~ /^192\.168\.122\./ {print $2; exit}')"; nmcli -t -f NAME,DEVICE connection show --active | awk -F: -v private_dev="$private_dev" '$2 == private_dev {print $1; exit}')"; test -n "$connection_name" && nmcli -g ipv6.method connection show "$connection_name" | grep -qx manual && nmcli -g connection.autoconnect connection show "$connection_name" | grep -qx yes
solution_outline: Make the requested configuration persistent and verify it before finishing.
task_titles: Configure the active lab connection with IPv6 address fd00:10::45/64
Ensure IPv6 method is manual and the profile autoconnects
solution_commands: nmcli connection modify "System eth1" ipv6.method manual ipv6.addresses fd00:10::45/64
nmcli connection modify "System eth1" ipv6.gateway fd00:10::1
nmcli connection modify "System eth1" ipv6.method manual connection.autoconnect yes
